item.title: NAS Build
item.description:
I wanted a better way to manage my photo/video storage, and started learning more about NASs. I was also interested in learning more about the self-hosted space. ## Notes: - I made an effort to try and source used parts. In my last 2 builds, I've only ever used new com...

Read full post

item.title: Gaming PC Build
item.description:
I built this PC to play Call of Duty. ## Notes: - I bought the graphics card on its launch date which was kinda exciting - I initially purchased an MSI PRO Z690-P, but ended up not being compatible, so returned to Newegg and replaced with an MSI PRO Z790-P - I ended up...

Read full post

item.title: March Retro
item.description:
This is the beginning of an attempt to mimic Michael Lynch's retrospectives. Hopefully this can help me achieve some of my goals, and maybe someone can find value in it as well. ## February Highlights - Launched my parent's websi...

item.title: My Favorite YouTubers
item.description:

item.title: Mini Crossword Puzzle Leaderboard
item.description:
Python, cron, GoogleCharts, GoogleSheetsAPI I decided to make this leaderboard because currently on the NYT website, you can only see your friends' current day's solve time. I think it would be interesting to see how people perform over time. Who has the fastest ti...

item.title: Meet Walker — Software Engineering Intern
item.description:
Tell us about yourself Hi, my name is Walker Sutton. I’m currently a student at Northeastern University studying computer science in Boston, MA. I grew up in a small town on Long Island. My mother is a chef, so I enjoyed learning how to cook whilst growing up. I thi...

item.title: Swing | Stock Trading Application
item.description:
SQL, PHP, jQuery, HTML, CSS, Javascript I took a Database Design course over the summer this year. For the final project, my partner and I decided to create a stock screening web application. Our initial idea was to create an algorithmic trading web app since w...

item.title: Forbidden Island World
item.description:
Java I took Fundamentals of Computer Science II during the summer of 2018. For our final project, we had to create a flooding island game. The game begins by your character randomly spawning somewhere on the island. As time advances, the water level rises, and...

item.title: SparkJuke | Raspberry Pi Jukebox
item.description:
C++, Raspberry Pi I took an intro to engineering course during the spring semester of my freshman year. I'm writing this summary almost two years after taking the course, but from what I remember, we concentrated on working with MATLAB during the first half of the...

item.title: Personal Website
item.description:
Node, Express, HTML, CSS, JS I decided I wanted to have a website on January 18, 2017. I can't remember why, but I think it's because I thought I needed to somehow promote my fundraiser for the NYC Marathon that year. At the time I had no idea how to build the site...

item.title: First Custom PC Build
item.description:
I purchased all of my parts from a local Microcenter. There, they helped me to choose what parts I needed VS wanted and also assisted in choosing parts that were the best bang for your buck. Going in there, I figured that the prices would be outrageous and I was planni...
